meta.purpose: Single source of truth for task tracking across all agents and sessions

related_files.tasks_archive.json: Completed tasks cleared from here to reduce clutter
related_files.tasks_icebox.json: Future ideas not yet queued for work

backlog.title: Generate initial task backlog from vision docs
backlog.description: Read docs/vision.md, docs/agent-architecture.md, docs/dev-containers.md, docs/voice-interaction.md, docs/task-management.md, and all docs/ideas/ files. Compare the documented vision against the current state of the repo. For each gap between vision and implementation, create a task in the backlog or icebox. Prioritize: structural/foundational work first (hooks, parsers, validation), then tooling (CI integration, model routing), then polish (voice pipeline, bootstrap scripts). This single task should produce the full initial task graph for the project.

context.status: Initial documentation and structure established. Vision docs, task management system (with functional linter and git hooks), agent templates, and devcontainer configs are in place. No application-level implementations yet -- the repo describes where we're headed and provides the tooling to track progress toward it.
